'''Rills''' were [[Reptile/Legends|reptiles]] native to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] that looked like [[Scyk/Legends|scyks]]. They were not aggressive unless attacked. They had spines along their backs and very sharp teeth, and lived in Tatooine's [[Desert/Legends|deserts]] alongside [[Womp rat/Legends|womp rats]].

After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Animal Control [[Officer/Legends|officer]] [[Entha Kandela]] tasked a spacer to eliminate tempest rills around [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] to prevent them to chew on the insulation of power cables in the city.<ref name="SWG:ACO">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|Animal Control Officer|Tatooine}}</ref>

Rill meat could be used as food.<ref name="SWG:I">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=static|Ind|Tatooine}}</ref>

{{Creature-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Rill-SWG.png|thumb|right|200px|A rill in ''Star Wars Galaxies'']]
Rills first appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG">{{GalaxiesAED}}</ref> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> In the game, the rills had the same appearance than the [[Dune lizard/Legends|dune lizards]], the [[Scyk/Legends|scyks]] and the [[dragonet]]s.<ref name="SWG" />
